text.title: MongoDB Document Design Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real nosql-mongodb-patterns deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: User document embeds an unbounded list of orders; document grows past 16 MB; updates rewrite the entire doc.
antipattern.root-cause: Author defaulted to embedding without checking child cardinality.
antipattern.fix: Embed only when count is bounded (<100); reference + index when unbounded.

antipattern.symptom: Production query takes seconds; explain shows COLLSCAN; collection has millions of documents.
antipattern.fix: Index every filter / sort / range field at design time; review explain output.

antipattern.symptom: Rolling migration cannot distinguish old-shape from new-shape documents; partial migration corrupts data.
antipattern.fix: Add schemaVersion integer to every collection; migration scripts increment it; queries can target version.
